option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Clean Butt</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg-top: #f0ddff;
      --bg-bottom: #d8b2ff;
      --panel: rgba(255,255,255,0.78);
      --panel-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
      --card-bg: rgba(255, 248, 255, 0.92);
      --card-border: rgba(173, 122, 214, 0.22);
      --text: #45225b;
      --muted: #7d648f;
      --primary: #8d3df2;
      --primary-dark: #6f27cd;
      --accent-soft: #f4e7ff;
      --shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(102, 50, 145, 0.16);
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      margin: 0;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px;
      font-family: "Trebuchet MS", "Avenir Next", Arial, sans-serif;
      color: var(--text);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255,255,255,0.55), transparent 28%),
        radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(255,255,255,0.35), transparent 24%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg-top) 0%, var(--bg-bottom) 100%);
    }
    body.success-love-mode {
      --bg-top: #ffd8e8;
      --bg-bottom: #ff9fc9;
      --panel: rgba(255, 239, 246, 0.88);
      --panel-border: rgba(247, 173, 204, 0.5);
      --card-bg: rgba(255, 244, 248, 0.95);
      --card-border: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.28);
      --text: #8b2d5a;
      --muted: #b05b82;
      --primary: #ff72b3;
      --primary-dark: #de468d;
      --accent-soft: #ffe6f0;
      --shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.2);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(255,255,255,0.7), transparent 26%),
        radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(255,213,232,0.5), transparent 24%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, #ffd8e8 0%, #ff9fc9 100%);
    }
    .heart-layer {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 50;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.35s ease;
    }
    body.success-love-mode .heart-layer {
      opacity: 1;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .heart {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -80px;
      width: calc(18px * var(--scale, 1));
      height: calc(18px * var(--scale, 1));
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,149,194,0.96), rgba(255,82,154,0.92));
      transform: rotate(45deg);
      opacity: var(--opacity, 0.5);
      animation: heart-rise var(--duration, 12s) linear infinite;
      animation-delay: var(--delay, 0s);
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 14px rgba(214, 62, 124, 0.18));
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .heart::before,
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .heart::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: inherit;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .heart::before {
      left: -50%;
      top: 0;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .heart::after {
      top: -50%;
      left: 0;
    }
    @keyframes heart-rise {
      0% {
        transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) rotate(45deg) scale(0.9);
      }
      100% {
        transform: translate3d(var(--drift, 0px), -120vh, 0) rotate(45deg) scale(1.12);
      }
    }
    .app {
      width: min(920px, 100%);
      overflow: visible;
      border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
      border-radius: 32px;
      background: var(--panel);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .app {
      border-color: rgba(245, 150, 189, 0.36);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,244,248,0.9), rgba(255,221,235,0.9));
      box-shadow: 0 28px 70px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.22);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .app.start-mode {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 0;
      background: transparent;
      box-shadow: none;
      backdrop-filter: none;
    }
    .app.start-mode {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 0;
      background: transparent;
      box-shadow: none;
      backdrop-filter: none;
    }
    .app.start-mode .topbar {
      display: none;
    }
    .topbar, .hero, .animation-stage, .game-grid, .btns, .tool-list, .play-area-wrap { display: grid; gap: 18px; }
    .topbar {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 22px 26px;
      border-radius: 32px 32px 0 0;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(142, 61, 242, 0.88), rgba(208, 151, 255, 0.92));
    }
    body.success-love-mode .topbar {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 97, 170, 0.94), rgba(255, 181, 215, 0.96));
    }
    body.success-love-mode #sceneStart.active .start-heading h1 {
      text-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.28);
    }
    body.success-love-mode #sceneStart.active .start-heading p {
      color: rgba(176, 72, 116, 0.86);
    }
    body.success-love-mode #sceneStart.active .start-weiju {
      filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 28px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.16));
    }
    body.success-love-mode #sceneStart.active .start-oli-button:hover,
    body.success-love-mode #sceneStart.active .start-oli-button.zooming {
      filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 28px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.2));
    }
    .title {
      font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 34px);
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      color: #ffffff;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(72, 18, 116, 0.26);
    }
    .title-transition {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: none;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 60;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(142, 61, 242, 0.96), rgba(208, 151, 255, 0.96));
      border-radius: 32px;
      opacity: 0;
    }
    body.success-love-mode .title-transition {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 104, 175, 0.96), rgba(255, 188, 219, 0.97));
    }
    .title-transition.active {
      display: flex;
      animation: title-transition-fade 6000ms ease forwards;
    }
    .title-transition-text {
      display: grid;
      gap: 16px;
      justify-items: center;
      width: min(760px, calc(100% - 48px));
      color: #ffffff;
      text-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(72, 18, 116, 0.24);
      transform: scale(1.08);
    }
    .title-transition.active .title-transition-text {
      animation: title-zoom-out 1650ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) 3920ms forwards;
    }
    .title-transition-main {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      font-size: clamp(42px, 7vw, 82px);
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 0.95;
    }
    .title-transition-subtitle {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0;
      font-size: clamp(16px, 2.2vw, 24px);
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      text-transform: none;
      color: #5f3377;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.94);
      border-radius: 999px;
      padding: 10px 18px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.92), 0 12px 24px rgba(72, 18, 116, 0.12);
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(22px) scale(0.92);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .title-transition-subtitle {
      color: #b43f75;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.92), 0 12px 24px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.14);
    }
    .title-transition-subtitle-letter {
      display: inline-block;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(18px) scale(0.82);
    }
    .title-transition-subtitle-space {
      width: 0.34em;
    }
    .title-transition-letter {
      display: inline-block;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(42px) scale(0.72);
    }
    .title-transition-space {
      width: 0.38em;
    }
    .title-transition-break {
      flex-basis: 100%;
      height: 0;
    }
    .title-transition.active .title-transition-letter {
      animation: title-letter-jump 320ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.9, 0.2, 1.18) forwards;
    }
    .title-transition.active .title-transition-subtitle {
      animation: title-subtitle-pop 620ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.9, 0.2, 1.1) 1940ms forwards;
    }
    .title-transition.active .title-transition-subtitle-letter {
      animation: title-subtitle-letter-jump 280ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.9, 0.2, 1.18) forwards;
    }
    .app.title-transitioning .topbar {
      opacity: 0;
      animation: topbar-reveal 900ms ease 4020ms both;
    }
    .app.title-transitioning #sceneIntro.active .intro-copy-card {
      opacity: 0;
      animation: intro-card-rise 950ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) 4140ms both;
    }
    .app.title-transitioning #sceneIntro.active .big-figure {
      opacity: 0;
      animation: intro-figure-reveal 900ms ease 4260ms both;
    }
    @keyframes title-transition-fade {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
      }
      10% {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      72% {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 0;
      }
    }
    @keyframes title-letter-jump {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(42px) scale(0.72);
      }
      65% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.08);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      }
    }
    @keyframes title-subtitle-pop {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(22px) scale(0.92);
      }
      70% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.03);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      }
    }
    @keyframes title-subtitle-letter-jump {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(18px) scale(0.82);
      }
      65% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.04);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      }
    }
    @keyframes title-zoom-out {
      0% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(-180px, -220px) scale(0.34);
      }
    }
    @keyframes topbar-reveal {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px) scale(0.98);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      }
    }
    @keyframes intro-card-rise {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(72px);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
    }
    @keyframes intro-figure-reveal {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(18px) scale(0.97);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      }
    }
    .badge {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #5f3377;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    }
    .scene { display: none; padding: 30px; }
    .scene.active { display: block; }
    .scene.start-screen {
      display: none;
      min-height: 620px;
      padding: 0;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .scene.start-screen.active {
      display: grid;
    }
    #sceneGame.active { overflow: visible; }
    .hero, .game-grid { grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; align-items: stretch; }
    .game-grid { grid-template-columns: minmax(300px, 340px) 1fr; align-items: start; }
    .card, .reaction {
      padding: 24px;
      border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
      border-radius: 26px;
      background: var(--card-bg);
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
    }
    .card {
      display: grid;
      gap: 18px;
      align-content: start;
    }
    h1, h2, h3, p { margin-top: 0; }
    h2, h3 { margin-bottom: 0; }
    p { margin-bottom: 0; }
    h2 {
      font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 36px);
      line-height: 1.04;
    }
    h3 {
      font-size: 23px;
      line-height: 1.1;
    }
    .sub { color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 600; }
    .start-card {
      width: min(560px, 100%);
      margin: 0 auto;
      text-align: center;
      justify-items: center;
    }
    .start-card.start-secret {
      width: 100%;
      min-height: 620px;
      gap: 0;
      background: transparent;
      border: none;
      box-shadow: none;
      padding: 0;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      isolation: isolate;
    }
    .start-weiju-gallery {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    .start-heading {
      position: absolute;
      top: 34px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      z-index: 30;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .start-heading h1 {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: clamp(34px, 6vw, 58px);
      line-height: 0.95;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      color: #ffffff;
      text-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(95, 44, 142, 0.28);
    }
    .start-heading p {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: clamp(14px, 2vw, 18px);
      font-weight: 800;
      color: rgba(74, 42, 95, 0.78);
    }
    .start-piece {
      touch-action: none;
      user-select: none;
      -webkit-user-drag: none;
      cursor: grab;
    }
    .start-piece.dragging {
      cursor: grabbing;
    }
    .start-weiju {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      width: clamp(108px, 14vw, 138px);
      height: clamp(108px, 14vw, 138px);
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 26px;
      opacity: 0.9;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 28px rgba(95, 44, 142, 0.16));
      animation: start-float 7.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
      pointer-events: auto;
    }
    .start-weiju.weiju1 {
      --float-x: 12px;
      --float-y: -10px;
      --float-r: -5deg;
      animation-duration: 7.6s;
      animation-delay: -1.5s;
    }
    .start-weiju.weiju2 {
      --float-x: -12px;
      --float-y: 12px;
      --float-r: 6deg;
      animation-duration: 7s;
      animation-delay: -3.1s;
    }
    .start-weiju.weiju3 {
      --float-x: 10px;
      --float-y: 14px;
      --float-r: -5deg;
      animation-duration: 8.2s;
      animation-delay: -2s;
    }
    .start-weiju.weiju4 {
      --float-x: -10px;
      --float-y: -12px;
      --float-r: 5deg;
      animation-duration: 7.2s;
      animation-delay: -4.1s;
    }
    .start-weiju.weiju5 {
      --float-x: 12px;
      --float-y: -14px;
      --float-r: -6deg;
      animation-duration: 8s;
      animation-delay: -2.6s;
    }
    .start-weiju.weiju6 {
      --float-x: -12px;
      --float-y: 12px;
      --float-r: 6deg;
      animation-duration: 7.5s;
      animation-delay: -5s;
    }
    @keyframes start-float {
      0% {
        transform: translate(calc(-50% + var(--stack-x, 0px) + var(--drag-x, 0px)), calc(-50% + var(--stack-y, 0px) + var(--drag-y, 0px))) rotate(var(--stack-r, 0deg)) scale(0.98);
      }
      100% {
        transform: translate(calc(-50% + var(--stack-x, 0px) + var(--drag-x, 0px) + var(--float-x)), calc(-50% + var(--stack-y, 0px) + var(--drag-y, 0px) + var(--float-y))) rotate(calc(var(--stack-r, 0deg) + var(--float-r))) scale(1.04);
      }
    }
    .start-oli-button {
      border: none;
      background: transparent;
      box-shadow: none;
      padding: 0;
      min-height: 0;
      width: clamp(138px, 18vw, 176px);
      height: clamp(138px, 18vw, 176px);
      cursor: pointer;
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      z-index: 1;
      border-radius: 34px;
      overflow: hidden;
      animation: start-float-oli 8s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }
    .start-oli-button:hover {
      filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 28px rgba(95, 44, 142, 0.18));
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    .start-oli-button img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      display: block;
    }
    @keyframes start-float-oli {
      0% {
        transform: translate(calc(-50% + var(--drag-x, 0px)), calc(-50% + var(--drag-y, 0px))) rotate(-3deg) scale(0.98);
      }
      100% {
        transform: translate(calc(-50% + var(--drag-x, 0px) + 8px), calc(-50% + var(--drag-y, 0px) - 10px)) rotate(-7deg) scale(1.03);
      }
    }
    .big-figure {
      position: relative;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid rgba(163, 102, 208, 0.18);
      border-radius: 28px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 24%, rgba(255,255,255,0.95) 0%, rgba(248,230,255,0.95) 42%, rgba(226,191,255,0.92) 100%);
    }
    .speech {
      position: absolute;
      top: 18px;
      right: 18px;
      max-width: 190px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: white;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #7a2cc2;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(103, 52, 143, 0.14);
    }
    .man, .butt {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      user-select: none;
    }
    .man { font-size: 140px; }
    .man img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    .man img#introOliver { cursor: pointer; }
    .butt {
      padding: 0;
    }
    .butt img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: contain;
      display: block;
    }
    .btns {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, max-content));
      justify-content: start;
      align-items: stretch;
    }
    button, .tool {
      border: none;
      border-radius: 18px;
      padding: 14px 18px;
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 800;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(91, 47, 133, 0.12);
      line-height: 1.5;
    }
    button {
      min-height: 52px;
      width: 100%;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;
    }
    button:disabled {
      cursor: not-allowed;
      opacity: 0.55;
      transform: none;
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    button:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(91, 47, 133, 0.18);
    }
    button:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
    .primary {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--primary), var(--primary-dark));
      color: white;
    }
    body.success-love-mode #playAgainBtn.primary {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ff79b8, #e2468d);
      color: #fff7fb;
      box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.24);
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .secondary {
      background: #fff;
      color: #5f3377;
      border: 1px solid rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.16);
    }
    .toggle-no {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #d9534f, #a92b2b);
      color: white;
    }
    .toggle-yes {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #47b36b, #218a45);
      color: white;
    }
    .intro-actions {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 180px);
      gap: 18px;
      width: 378px;
      max-width: 100%;
      align-items: stretch;
    }
    .intro-actions button {
      height: 52px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
    }
    .intro-actions.no-active #goToPoop {
      opacity: 0.55;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .danger {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #8b5a2b, #5c3310);
      color: white;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(92, 51, 16, 0.24);
    }
    .animation-stage {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
      margin-top: 6px;
      align-items: stretch;
    }
    .animation-progress {
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .animation-progress-label {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #7b5b91;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .animation-progress-track {
      height: 14px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f1defa, #ead0f8);
      border: 1px solid rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.1);
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
    }
    .animation-progress-fill {
      width: 0;
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8d3df2, #d392ff);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(141, 61, 242, 0.12);
      transition: width 0.35s ease;
    }
    .frame {
      min-height: 0;
      padding: 18px 18px 16px;
      text-align: center;
      opacity: 0.35;
      transform: scale(0.98);
      border: 1px solid rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.16);
      border-radius: 24px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.94), rgba(245,233,255,0.92));
      box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(98, 55, 135, 0.08);
      transition: 0.25s ease;
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      align-content: start;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .frame.active {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: scale(1);
      border-color: rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.45);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,1), rgba(241,226,255,1));
      box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(110, 62, 151, 0.14);
    }
    .frame img {
      max-width: 100%;
      width: 100%;
      height: 220px;
      object-fit: contain;
      margin: 0 auto;
      display: block;
    }
    .frame-title {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #5f3377;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    }
    .frame-copy {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: "Courier New", "American Typewriter", "Liberation Mono", monospace;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .frame-action {
      justify-self: center;
      min-width: 120px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #b76b2d, #8a4718);
      color: #fff8ef;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(103, 52, 24, 0.18);
    }
    .frame-action.hidden {
      display: none;
    }
    .tool-list {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 14px;
      width: 100%;
    }
    .tool {
      cursor: pointer;
      min-height: 88px;
      padding: 14px 16px;
      text-align: left;
      border: 2px solid rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.1);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.96), rgba(250,243,255,0.96));
      width: 100%;
      transition: transform 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background-color 0.18s ease;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
    }
    .tool:hover {
      transform: translateY(-1px);
      border-color: rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.28);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(91, 47, 133, 0.12);
    }
    .tool img {
      width: 56px;
      height: 56px;
      flex: 0 0 56px;
      object-fit: contain;
      display: block;
      margin: 0;
    }
    .tool-label {
      display: block;
      font-size: 17px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #4a2a5f;
      line-height: 1.25;
      text-align: left;
    }
    .tool.selected {
      border-color: var(--primary);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7efff, #f0e1ff);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 30px rgba(120, 61, 183, 0.16);
    }
    .tool small { display: block; margin-top: 6px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 14px; }
    .meter {
      height: 18px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f1defa, #ead0f8);
      border: 1px solid rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.08);
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .meter.chaos {
      overflow: visible;
    }
    .meter-fill {
      height: 100%;
      width: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7f4b23, #b46b31);
      transform-origin: left center;
      transition: width 0.15s linear, background 0.15s linear;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }
    .meter.chaos .meter-fill {
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(116, 65, 31, 0.14), 12px 0 24px rgba(116, 65, 31, 0.22);
    }
    .play-area {
      position: relative;
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
      min-height: 420px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 2px solid rgba(169, 112, 213, 0.18);
      border-radius: 32px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(255,255,255,0.52), transparent 34%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, #ffeaf8 0%, #ffd9f4 100%);
      user-select: none;
      touch-action: none;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    }
    .play-area.clean-finish .stain {
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .stain {
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      top: 52%;
      width: 180px;
      height: 120px;
      border-radius: 50% 48% 46% 52% / 58% 50% 55% 52%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 40%, rgba(120,65,29,0.95), rgba(99,53,22,0.96) 55%, rgba(82,43,18,0.98));
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      transition: opacity 0.22s linear, filter 0.28s ease, transform 0.32s ease;
      z-index: 3;
    }
    .sparkle-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 4;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .sparkle {
      position: absolute;
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(45deg);
      animation: sparkle-pop 4000ms ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .sparkle::before,
    .sparkle::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      top: 50%;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,1), rgba(255,231,130,0.95));
      box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255, 234, 140, 0.9);
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .sparkle::before {
      width: 5px;
      height: 28px;
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .sparkle::after {
      width: 28px;
      height: 5px;
    }
    @keyframes sparkle-pop {
      0% {
        opacity: 0.45;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.76) rotate(0deg);
      }
      20% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05) rotate(45deg);
      }
      50% {
        opacity: 0.95;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(68deg);
      }
      80% {
        opacity: 0.7;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.94) rotate(85deg);
      }
      100% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.82) rotate(90deg);
      }
    }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol */
    .smear, .cursor-tool { position: absolute; pointer-events: none; }
    /* noinspection CssUnusedSymbol, CssUnresolvedCustomProperty */
    .smear {
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(92, 45, 16, 0.26);
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(var(--r));
      opacity: 1;
      transition: opacity 0.22s ease, transform 0.22s ease;
    }
    .smear.cleaning-away {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(var(--r)) scale(0.7);
    }
    .cursor-tool {
      display: none;
      width: 54px;
      height: 54px;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15));
      z-index: 5;
    }
    .cursor-tool img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: contain;
      display: block;
    }
    .reaction { min-height: 92px; line-height: 1.6; font-weight: 800; }
    .result-box {
      display: grid;
      gap: 16px;
      justify-items: center;
      padding: 30px 24px 18px;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .result-box.success-love {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid rgba(241, 132, 177, 0.26);
      border-radius: 30px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(255,255,255,0.78), transparent 32%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,242,247,0.96), rgba(255,214,230,0.96));
      box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.16);
    }
    body.success-love-mode #sceneResult.active {
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(255,255,255,0.35), transparent 30%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,232,241,0.62), rgba(255,199,221,0.62));
      border-radius: 30px;
    }
    body.success-love-mode .badge,
    body.success-love-mode .frame-title,
    body.success-love-mode .tool-label,
    body.success-love-mode .secondary {
      color: #b13972;
    }
    body.success-love-mode .big-figure {
      border-color: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.24);
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 24%, rgba(255,255,255,0.98) 0%, rgba(255,236,243,0.96) 42%, rgba(255,208,224,0.94) 100%);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .speech {
      color: #cb4f88;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.16);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .animation-progress-label {
      color: #c2608c;
    }
    body.success-love-mode .animation-progress-track,
    body.success-love-mode .meter {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffe7f0, #ffd3e3);
      border-color: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.14);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .animation-progress-fill {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff75b6, #ffb1d4);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(255, 114, 179, 0.14);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .frame {
      border-color: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.2);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.96), rgba(255,237,244,0.95));
      box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.1);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .frame.active {
      border-color: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.42);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,1), rgba(255,224,236,1));
      box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.16);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .tool {
      border-color: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.14);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.97), rgba(255,239,245,0.97));
      box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.08);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .tool:hover {
      border-color: rgba(240, 136, 183, 0.3);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.14);
    }
    body.success-love-mode .tool.selected {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fff2f7, #ffdce9);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 30px rgba(210, 82, 141, 0.18);
    }
    .result-box.success-love::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 14% 18%, rgba(255,255,255,0.48), transparent 16%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 82% 22%, rgba(255,255,255,0.34), transparent 18%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(255,162,206,0.2), transparent 38%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .result-box.success-love #resultTitle {
      color: #c13f7c;
      text-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(218, 99, 155, 0.16);
    }
    .result-box.success-love #resultText {
      color: #9d4f74;
    }
    #resultText {
      white-space: pre-line;
    }
    .result-face {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      width: min(360px, 100%);
      height: 260px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .result-face img,
    .result-face video {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: contain;
      display: block;
      background: transparent;
    }
    @media (max-width: 760px) {
      .topbar, .hero, .animation-stage, .game-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .topbar { text-align: center; }
      .btns { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .intro-actions {
        width: 100%;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      }
      .butt { padding: 0; }
      .play-area { min-height: 0; }
      .stain { width: 140px; height: 95px; }
      .frame { padding: 16px; }
      .frame img { height: 160px; }
      .result-face {
        width: min(300px, 100%);
        height: 220px;
      }
      .start-weiju {
        width: clamp(82px, 22vw, 110px);
        height: clamp(82px, 22vw, 110px);
        border-radius: 22px;
      }
      .start-oli-button {
        width: clamp(110px, 28vw, 140px);
        height: clamp(110px, 28vw, 140px);
        border-radius: 26px;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="heart-layer" id="heartLayer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="app start-mode">
    <div class="topbar" id="topbar">
      <div class="title">Butt Cleaning Mission✨</div>
      <div class="badge" id="statusBadge">Status: Standby</div>
    </div>
    <div class="title-transition" id="titleTransition" aria-hidden="true">
      <div class="title-transition-text">
        <div class="title-transition-main">
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 0ms;">B</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 60ms;">u</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 120ms;">t</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 180ms;">t</span>
          <span class="title-transition-space"></span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 380ms;">C</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 440ms;">l</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 500ms;">e</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 560ms;">a</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 620ms;">n</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 680ms;">i</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 740ms;">n</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 800ms;">g</span>
          <span class="title-transition-break"></span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1000ms;">M</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1060ms;">i</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1120ms;">s</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1180ms;">s</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1240ms;">i</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1300ms;">o</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1360ms;">n</span>
          <span class="title-transition-letter" style="animation-delay: 1420ms;">✨</span>
        </div>
        <span class="title-transition-subtitle">
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 1940ms;">S</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2000ms;">p</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2060ms;">e</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2120ms;">c</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2180ms;">i</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2240ms;">a</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2300ms;">l</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-space"></span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2500ms;">T</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2560ms;">o</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2620ms;">i</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2680ms;">l</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2740ms;">e</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 2800ms;">t</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-space"></span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3000ms;">O</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3060ms;">p</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3120ms;">e</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3180ms;">r</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3240ms;">a</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3300ms;">t</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3360ms;">i</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3420ms;">o</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3480ms;">n</span>
          <span class="title-transition-subtitle-letter" style="animation-delay: 3540ms;">s</span>
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <section class="scene start-screen active" id="sceneStart">
      <div class="card start-card start-secret">
        <div class="start-heading">
          <h1>Find Oliver</h1>
          <p>Move the cards to discover him.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="start-weiju-gallery" aria-hidden="true">
          <img class="start-piece start-weiju weiju1" src="weiju1.webp" alt="" decoding="async">
          <img class="start-piece start-weiju weiju2" src="weiju2.webp" alt="" decoding="async">
          <img class="start-piece start-weiju weiju3" src="weiju3.webp" alt="" decoding="async">
          <img class="start-piece start-weiju weiju4" src="weiju4.webp" alt="" decoding="async">
          <img class="start-piece start-weiju weiju5" src="weiju5.webp" alt="" decoding="async">
          <img class="start-piece start-weiju weiju6" src="weiju6.webp" alt="" decoding="async">
        </div>
        <button class="start-piece start-oli-button" id="startExperienceBtn" aria-label="Start birthday experience">
          <img src="Oliver_hehe.webp" alt="Oliver" decoding="async">
        </button>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="scene" id="sceneIntro">
      <div class="hero">
        <div class="card intro-copy-card">
          <div class="badge" style="width:max-content;">Special Toilet Operations</div>
          <h2>Uh oh stinky.....<br>Oliver wants to go to the toilet </h2>
          <p class="sub">Should we send him to the toilet?</p>
          <div class="btns intro-actions" id="introActions">
            <button class="primary" id="goToPoop">Go Poop</button>
            <button class="toggle-no" id="sayNoBtn">No</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="big-figure">
          <div class="man"><img src="Oliver_hehe.webp" alt="Boyfriend" id="introOliver" decoding="async" loading="eager" fetchpriority="high"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="scene" id="sceneAnimation">
      <div class="card">
        <h2 style="text-align:center;">Oli Goes To The Toilet</h2>
        <div class="animation-progress" aria-label="Toilet mission progress">
          <div class="animation-progress-label" id="animationProgressLabel">Mission Progress: 0%</div>
          <div class="animation-progress-track">
            <div class="animation-progress-fill" id="animationProgressFill"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="animation-stage">
          <div class="frame" id="frame1">
            <img src="Oliver_sprint.webp" alt="Oliver sprinting to the toilet" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
            <div class="frame-title">Turbo Mode Activated</div>
            <div class="frame-copy" data-story-text="Oliver felt the rumble of destiny and activated turbo mode. He sprinted to the toilet like a true hero, fighting for his life and for the safety of everyone nearby."></div>
          </div>
          <div class="frame" id="frame2">
            <img src="Oliver_toilet.webp" alt="Oliver safely reaching the toilet" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
            <div class="frame-title">Just In Time</div>
            <div class="frame-copy" data-story-text="He made it just in time, sat down, and achieved absolute inner peace."></div>
            <button class="frame-action hidden" id="poopButton" type="button">Poop</button>
          </div>
          <div class="frame" id="frame3">
            <img src="Oliver_poop.webp" alt="Oliver's proud masterpiece" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
            <div class="frame-title">Mission Complete</div>
            <div class="frame-copy" data-story-text="A few moments later, his masterpiece appeared: a proud little poop with Oliver's own face, looking way too pleased with itself."></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="btns">
          <button class="primary" id="nextToGame">Wipe Butt</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="scene" id="sceneGame">
      <div class="game-grid">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="badge" style="width:max-content;">Tool Selection</div>
          <h3>Choose a Tool</h3>
          <div class="tool-list">
            <div class="tool selected" data-tool="paper"><img src="paper.webp" alt="Toilet paper" loading="lazy" decoding="async"><span class="tool-label">Toilet Paper</span></div>
            <div class="tool" data-tool="wipe"><img src="wet.webp" alt="Wet wipes" loading="lazy" decoding="async"><span class="tool-label">Wet Wipes</span></div>
            <div class="tool" data-tool="hand"><img src="hand.webp" alt="Bare hand" loading="lazy" decoding="async"><span class="tool-label">Bare Hand</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="btns">
            <button class="primary" id="finishBtn">Done Scrubbing, Inspect Me</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="play-area-wrap">
          <div class="card">
            <strong>Remaining Poopoo </strong>
            <div class="meter" style="margin-top:10px;"><div class="meter-fill" id="meterFill"></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="play-area" id="playArea">
            <div class="butt"><img src="Oliver_ass.webp" alt="Oliver butt" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
            <div class="stain" id="stain"></div>
            <div class="sparkle-layer" id="sparkleLayer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="cursor-tool" id="cursorTool"><img src="paper.webp" alt="paper tool" decoding="async" loading="eager"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="reaction" id="reactionBox">Please select a tool first, then click and drag on the ASS.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="scene" id="sceneResult">
      <div class="result-box" id="resultBox">
        <div class="result-face" id="resultFace"><img src="Weiju_ok.webp" alt="Inspection reaction" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
        <h2 id="resultTitle">Inspection Results</h2>
        <p class="sub" id="resultText"></p>
        <div class="btns" style="justify-content:center; width:min(220px, 100%);">
          <button class="primary" id="playAgainBtn">Play Again</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
  <audio id="bgMusic" preload="auto" src="Tomodachi Life.mp3" loop></audio>
  <audio id="poopSound" preload="auto" src="poop_sound.mp3"></audio>

  <script>
    const appShell = document.querySelector(".app");
    const scenes = {
      start: document.getElementById("sceneStart"),
      intro: document.getElementById("sceneIntro"),
      animation: document.getElementById("sceneAnimation"),
      game: document.getElementById("sceneGame"),
      result: document.getElementById("sceneResult")
    };

    const statusBadge = document.getElementById("statusBadge");
    const reactionBox = document.getElementById("reactionBox");
    const playArea = document.getElementById("playArea");
    const stain = document.getElementById("stain");
    const sparkleLayer = document.getElementById("sparkleLayer");
    const meter = document.querySelector(".meter");
    const meterFill = document.getElementById("meterFill");
    const cursorTool = document.getElementById("cursorTool");
    const resultFace = document.getElementById("resultFace");
    const resultBox = document.getElementById("resultBox");
    const resultTitle = document.getElementById("resultTitle");
    const resultText = document.getElementById("resultText");
    const playAgainBtn = document.getElementById("playAgainBtn");
    const heartLayer = document.getElementById("heartLayer");
    const animationProgressFill = document.getElementById("animationProgressFill");
    const animationProgressLabel = document.getElementById("animationProgressLabel");
    const introOliver = document.getElementById("introOliver");
    const introActions = document.getElementById("introActions");
    const startExperienceBtn = document.getElementById("startExperienceBtn");
    const titleTransition = document.getElementById("titleTransition");
    const goToPoopBtn = document.getElementById("goToPoop");
    const sayNoBtn = document.getElementById("sayNoBtn");
    const poopButton = document.getElementById("poopButton");
    const startPieces = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".start-piece"));
    const startWeijus = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".start-weiju"));
    const bgMusic = document.getElementById("bgMusic");
    const poopSound = document.getElementById("poopSound");
    const frames = ["frame1", "frame2", "frame3"].map(id => document.getElementById(id));
    const frameCopies = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".frame-copy"));
    const cursorToolImage = cursorTool.querySelector("img");
    const introOliverImages = [
      "Oliver_hehe.webp",
      "oliver1.webp",
      "oliver2.webp",
      "oliver3.webp",
      "oliver4.webp"
    ];
    const introOliverStateImages = [...introOliverImages, "Oliver_no.webp"];
    const toolAssets = {
      wipe: ["wet.webp", "Wet wipes mode activated. Now we're talking like a civilized person."],
      paper: ["paper.webp", "Toilet paper mode activated. You're trying, but I'm not holding my breath."],
      hand: ["hand.webp", "Bare hand mode activated. Are you trying to make this an international incident?"]
    };

    let currentTool = "paper";
    let dirt = 100;
    let usingHand = false;
    let isPointerDown = false;
    let activePointerId = null;
    let smearCount = 0;
    let animationTimer = null;
    let storyTypingTimer = null;
    let resultAction = "home";
    let cleanCelebrated = false;
    let progressAnimationFrame = null;
    let animationProgressStartTime = 0;
    let animationProgressDuration = 1;
    let introSaysNo = false;
    let waitingForPoop = false;
    let continueAnimationAfterPoop = null;
    let progressPausedPercent = 0;
    let prePoopProgressDuration = 1;
    let postPoopProgressDuration = 1;
    let clickAudioContext = null;
    let lastWipeSoundTime = 0;
    let introOliverImageIndex = 0;
    let suppressStartClick = false;
    let titleTransitionTimer = null;
    let isTitleTransitionRunning = false;
    let loveThemeUnlocked = false;
    const preloadedIntroOliverImages = [];

    function showScene(name) {
      Object.values(scenes).forEach(scene => scene.classList.remove("active"));
      scenes[name].classList.add("active");
      appShell.classList.toggle("start-mode", name === "start");
      if (name === "start") {
        arrangeStartPile();
      }
    }

    function setStatus(text) {
      statusBadge.textContent = "Status: " + text;
    }

    function clearAnimationTimer() {
      if (animationTimer !== null) {
        clearTimeout(animationTimer);
        animationTimer = null;
      }
    }

    function clearStoryTyping() {
      if (storyTypingTimer !== null) {
        clearTimeout(storyTypingTimer);
        storyTypingTimer = null;
      }
    }

    function clearProgressAnimation() {
      if (progressAnimationFrame !== null) {
        window.cancelAnimationFrame(progressAnimationFrame);
        progressAnimationFrame = null;
      }
    }

    function clearTitleTransitionTimer() {
      if (titleTransitionTimer !== null) {
        clearTimeout(titleTransitionTimer);
        titleTransitionTimer = null;
      }
    }

    function playPoopSound() {
      if (!poopSound) {
        return;
      }
      poopSound.pause();
      poopSound.currentTime = 0;
      poopSound.play().catch(() => {});
    }

    function playClickSound() {
      const AudioContextClass = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
      if (!AudioContextClass) {
        return;
      }

      if (!clickAudioContext) {
        clickAudioContext = new AudioContextClass();
      }

      if (clickAudioContext.state === "suspended") {
        clickAudioContext.resume().catch(() => {});
      }

      const now = clickAudioContext.currentTime;
      const oscillator = clickAudioContext.createOscillator();
      const gainNode = clickAudioContext.createGain();

      oscillator.type = "triangle";
      oscillator.frequency.setValueAtTime(900, now);
      oscillator.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(560, now + 0.05);

      gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
      gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.03, now + 0.01);
      gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 0.07);

      oscillator.connect(gainNode);
      gainNode.connect(clickAudioContext.destination);
      oscillator.start(now);
      oscillator.stop(now + 0.08);
    }

    function playWipeSound(intensity = 1) {
      const AudioContextClass = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
      if (!AudioContextClass) {
        return;
      }

      const nowMs = performance.now();
      if (nowMs - lastWipeSoundTime < 55) {
        return;
      }
      lastWipeSoundTime = nowMs;

      if (!clickAudioContext) {
        clickAudioContext = new AudioContextClass();
      }

      if (clickAudioContext.state === "suspended") {
        clickAudioContext.resume().catch(() => {});
      }

      const now = clickAudioContext.currentTime;
      const duration = 0.08;
      const bufferSize = Math.max(1, Math.floor(clickAudioContext.sampleRate * duration));
      const buffer = clickAudioContext.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, clickAudioContext.sampleRate);
      const channel = buffer.getChannelData(0);
      const gainValue = Math.min(0.028, 0.012 + intensity * 0.008);

      for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i += 1) {
        const progress = 1 - i / bufferSize;
        channel[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * progress * 0.65;
      }

      const source = clickAudioContext.createBufferSource();
      const filter = clickAudioContext.createBiquadFilter();
      const gainNode = clickAudioContext.createGain();

      source.buffer = buffer;
      filter.type = "bandpass";
      filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(1200 + intensity * 500, now);
      filter.Q.setValueAtTime(0.9, now);

      gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
      gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(gainValue, now + 0.01);
      gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + duration);

      source.connect(filter);
      filter.connect(gainNode);
      gainNode.connect(clickAudioContext.destination);
      source.start(now);
      source.stop(now + duration);
    }

    function ensureBackgroundMusic() {
      if (!bgMusic || !bgMusic.paused) {
        return;
      }
      bgMusic.volume = 0.35;
      bgMusic.play().catch(() => {});
    }

    function switchBackgroundMusic(src, volume = 0.35) {
      if (!bgMusic) {
        return;
      }
      if (!bgMusic.src.endsWith(encodeURI(src)) && !bgMusic.src.endsWith(src)) {
        bgMusic.pause();
        bgMusic.src = src;
        bgMusic.load();
      }
      bgMusic.volume = volume;
      bgMusic.play().catch(() => {});
    }

    function updateIntroOliverImage() {
      introOliver.src = introOliverImages[introOliverImageIndex];
    }

    function preloadIntroOliverImages() {
      introOliverStateImages.forEach(src => {
        const image = new Image();
        image.decoding = "async";
        image.src = src;
        preloadedIntroOliverImages.push(image);

        if (typeof image.decode === "function") {
          image.decode().catch(() => {});
        }
      });
    }

    function preloadToolImages() {
      Object.values(toolAssets).forEach(([src]) => {
        const image = new Image();
        image.decoding = "async";
        image.src = src;
        preloadedIntroOliverImages.push(image);

        if (typeof image.decode === "function") {
          image.decode().catch(() => {});
        }
      });
    }

    function createFloatingHearts() {
      if (!heartLayer) {
        return;
      }

      heartLayer.innerHTML = "";
      for (let index = 0; index < 30; index += 1) {
        const heart = document.createElement("div");
        heart.className = "heart";
        heart.style.left = `${Math.random() * 100}%`;
        heart.style.setProperty("--scale", (0.7 + Math.random() * 1.5).toFixed(2));
        heart.style.setProperty("--opacity", (0.18 + Math.random() * 0.46).toFixed(2));
        heart.style.setProperty("--duration", `${8 + Math.random() * 10}s`);
        heart.style.setProperty("--delay", `${-Math.random() * 18}s`);
        heart.style.setProperty("--drift", `${Math.round((Math.random() - 0.5) * 110)}px`);
        heartLayer.appendChild(heart);
      }
    }

    function setSuccessLoveMode(isActive) {
      const shouldEnable = isActive || loveThemeUnlocked;
      document.body.classList.toggle("success-love-mode", shouldEnable);
      if (resultBox) {
        resultBox.classList.toggle("success-love", shouldEnable);
      }
      if (shouldEnable) {
        createFloatingHearts();
      }
    }

    function cycleIntroOliverImage() {
      if (introSaysNo) {
        return;
      }

      introOliverImageIndex = (introOliverImageIndex + 1) % introOliverImages.length;
      updateIntroOliverImage();
    }

    function isOliverCovered() {
      const buttonRect = startExperienceBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
      const buttonArea = buttonRect.width * buttonRect.height;

      return startWeijus.some(piece => {
        const pieceRect = piece.getBoundingClientRect();
        const overlapWidth = Math.min(buttonRect.right, pieceRect.right) - Math.max(buttonRect.left, pieceRect.left);
        const overlapHeight = Math.min(buttonRect.bottom, pieceRect.bottom) - Math.max(buttonRect.top, pieceRect.top);
        const overlapArea = Math.max(0, overlapWidth) * Math.max(0, overlapHeight);

        return overlapArea / buttonArea > 0.5;
      });
    }

    function playIntroTitleTransition() {
      if (isTitleTransitionRunning) {
        return;
      }

      isTitleTransitionRunning = true;
      clearTitleTransitionTimer();
      showScene("intro");
      setStatus("Emergency Meeting");
      appShell.classList.add("title-transitioning");
      titleTransition.classList.add("active");

      titleTransitionTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
        titleTransition.classList.remove("active");
        appShell.classList.remove("title-transitioning");
        isTitleTransitionRunning = false;
        titleTransitionTimer = null;
      }, 6000);
    }

    function arrangeStartPile() {
      startWeijus.forEach((piece, index) => {
        const stackX = Math.round((Math.random() - 0.5) * 28);
        const stackY = Math.round((Math.random() - 0.5) * 28);
        const stackR = Math.round((Math.random() - 0.5) * 24);
        piece.style.setProperty("--stack-x", stackX + "px");
        piece.style.setProperty("--stack-y", stackY + "px");
        piece.style.setProperty("--stack-r", stackR + "deg");
        piece.style.setProperty("--drag-x", "0px");
        piece.style.setProperty("--drag-y", "0px");
        piece.style.zIndex = String(20 + index);
      });
      startExperienceBtn.style.setProperty("--drag-x", "0px");
      startExperienceBtn.style.setProperty("--drag-y", "0px");
      startExperienceBtn.style.zIndex = "1";
    }

    function setIntroDecisionState(isNo) {
      introSaysNo = isNo;
      introOliver.src = isNo ? "Oliver_no.webp" : introOliverImages[introOliverImageIndex];
      sayNoBtn.textContent = isNo ? "Yes" : "No";
      sayNoBtn.className = isNo ? "toggle-yes" : "toggle-no";
      introActions.classList.toggle("no-active", isNo);
      goToPoopBtn.disabled = isNo;
    }

    function setAnimationProgress(progressPercent) {
      const safeProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, progressPercent));
      animationProgressFill.style.width = safeProgress + "%";
      animationProgressLabel.textContent = `Mission Progress: ${Math.floor(safeProgress)}%`;
    }

    function startAnimationProgress(totalDuration, startPercent = 0, endPercent = 99) {
      clearProgressAnimation();
      animationProgressStartTime = performance.now();
      animationProgressDuration = Math.max(1, totalDuration);
      setAnimationProgress(startPercent);

      function tick(now) {
        const elapsed = now - animationProgressStartTime;
        const progressRange = endPercent - startPercent;
        const progress = Math.min(endPercent, startPercent + elapsed / animationProgressDuration * progressRange);
        setAnimationProgress(progress);

        if (elapsed < animationProgressDuration) {
          progressAnimationFrame = window.requestAnimationFrame(tick);
        } else {
          progressAnimationFrame = null;
          setAnimationProgress(endPercent);
        }
      }

      progressAnimationFrame = window.requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }

    function setFrameCopy(frameIndex, text) {
      if (frameCopies[frameIndex]) {
        frameCopies[frameIndex].textContent = text;
      }
    }

    function runAnimation() {
      clearAnimationTimer();
      clearStoryTyping();
      clearProgressAnimation();
      switchBackgroundMusic("Tomodachi Life.mp3", 0.35);
      poopSound.pause();
      poopSound.currentTime = 0;
      setIntroDecisionState(false);
      showScene("animation");
      setStatus("Pooping...");
      frames.forEach(frame => frame.classList.remove("active"));
      frameCopies.forEach(copy => {
        copy.textContent = "";
      });
      poopButton.classList.add("hidden");
      poopButton.textContent = "Poop";
      waitingForPoop = false;
      continueAnimationAfterPoop = null;
      progressPausedPercent = 0;

      let index = 0;
      const frameDisplayDuration = 650;
      const delayBetweenFrames = 800;
      const frame1Duration = frameDisplayDuration + (frameCopies[0].dataset.storyText || "").length * 35 + delayBetweenFrames;
      const frame2Duration = frameDisplayDuration + (frameCopies[1].dataset.storyText || "").length * 35;
      const frame3Duration = frameDisplayDuration + (frameCopies[2].dataset.storyText || "").length * 35;
      prePoopProgressDuration = frame1Duration + frame2Duration;
      postPoopProgressDuration = frame3Duration;
      const totalDuration = prePoopProgressDuration + postPoopProgressDuration;
      progressPausedPercent = prePoopProgressDuration / totalDuration * 99;
      startAnimationProgress(prePoopProgressDuration, 0, progressPausedPercent);

      function nextStep() {
        if (index < frames.length) {
          frames[index].classList.add("active");

          animationTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
            typeStoryParagraphSmooth(index, () => {
              index += 1;
              if (index === 2) {
                waitingForPoop = true;
                clearProgressAnimation();
                setAnimationProgress(progressPausedPercent);
                poopButton.classList.remove("hidden");
                continueAnimationAfterPoop = () => {
                  waitingForPoop = false;
                  poopButton.textContent = "Poop Again";
                  startAnimationProgress(postPoopProgressDuration, progressPausedPercent, 99);
                  animationTimer = window.setTimeout(nextStep, delayBetweenFrames);
                };
              } else {
                animationTimer = window.setTimeout(nextStep, delayBetweenFrames);
              }
            });
          }, frameDisplayDuration);
        } else {
          animationTimer = null;
          clearProgressAnimation();
          setAnimationProgress(100);
          poopButton.classList.add("hidden");
          poopButton.textContent = "Poop";
        }
      }

      nextStep();
    }

    function typeStoryParagraphSmooth(paragraphIndex, callback) {
      const storyText = frameCopies[paragraphIndex].dataset.storyText || "";
      let charIndex = 0;

      function typeNextCharacter() {
        if (charIndex >= storyText.length) {
          storyTypingTimer = null;
          if (callback) callback();
          return;
        }

        const typedText = storyText.slice(0, charIndex + 1);
        setFrameCopy(paragraphIndex, typedText);
        charIndex += 1;

        storyTypingTimer = window.setTimeout(typeNextCharacter, 35);
      }

      typeNextCharacter();
    }

    function endPointerInteraction() {
      isPointerDown = false;
      activePointerId = null;
      cursorTool.style.display = "none";
    }

    function setTool(tool) {
      currentTool = tool;
      document.querySelectorAll(".tool").forEach(el => {
        el.classList.toggle("selected", el.dataset.tool === tool);
      });
      cursorToolImage.src = toolAssets[tool][0];
      cursorToolImage.alt = `${tool} tool`;
      reactionBox.textContent = toolAssets[tool][1];
    }

    function updateDirt() {
      const visibleDirt = Math.max(0, Math.min(160, dirt));
      const meterPercent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, visibleDirt));
      const isOverflowing = dirt > 100;
      const activeSmearCount = document.querySelectorAll(".smear:not(.cleaning-away)").length;
      const chaosMeterPercent = isOverflowing
        ? Math.max(0, Math.min(140, dirt))
        : meterPercent;
      const fullyClean = visibleDirt <= 2 && !usingHand;
      const overflowAmount = Math.max(0, dirt - 100);
      const messBoost = Math.min(1, overflowAmount / 30);
      const opacity = fullyClean ? 0 : 0.15 + meterPercent / 100 * 0.8;
      const scale = fullyClean
        ? 0.82
        : 0.92 + meterPercent / 100 * 0.12 + messBoost * 0.9;
      const rotate = fullyClean
        ? 0
        : Math.min(20, activeSmearCount * 0.35 + overflowAmount * 0.1);
      const blurAmount = fullyClean
        ? 0
        : Math.min(6, activeSmearCount * 0.08 + overflowAmount * 0.025 + (dirt < 20 ? 1.2 : 0));
      stain.style.opacity = opacity;
      stain.style.transform = `translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${rotate}deg) scale(${scale})`;
      stain.style.filter = `blur(${blurAmount}px) saturate(${fullyClean ? 1 : 1.08 + messBoost * 0.12})`;
      playArea.classList.toggle("clean-finish", fullyClean);
      meter.classList.toggle("chaos", isOverflowing);
      meterFill.style.width = fullyClean ? "0%" : chaosMeterPercent + "%";
      meterFill.style.background = isOverflowing
        ? "linear-gradient(90deg, #6a3415, #8f4517 55%, #c05f1f)"
        : dirt > 65
        ? "linear-gradient(90deg, #7f4b23, #b46b31)"
        : dirt > 25
          ? "linear-gradient(90deg, #c0864a, #e0a968)"
          : "linear-gradient(90deg, #ffcf8f, #ffdba9)";
    }

    function launchSparkleBurst() {
      sparkleLayer.innerHTML = "";
      const sparklePoints = [
        [45, 34], [58, 40], [37, 49], [62, 54], [49, 61], [54, 48]
      ];
      sparklePoints.forEach(([left, top], index) => {
        const sparkle = document.createElement("div");
        sparkle.className = "sparkle";
        sparkle.style.left = left + "%";
        sparkle.style.top = top + "%";
        sparkle.style.animationDelay = index * 90 + "ms";
        sparkleLayer.appendChild(sparkle);
      });
    }

    function addSmear(x, y) {
      const smear = document.createElement("div");
      smear.className = "smear";
      smear.style.left = x + "px";
      smear.style.top = y + "px";
      smear.style.width = 28 + Math.random() * 38 + "px";
      smear.style.height = 12 + Math.random() * 18 + "px";
      smear.style.setProperty("--r", Math.round(Math.random() * 170) + "deg");
      playArea.appendChild(smear);
      window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (!smear.isConnected || smear.classList.contains("cleaning-away")) {
          return;
        }
        smear.classList.add("cleaning-away");
        window.setTimeout(() => {
          if (smear.isConnected) {
            smear.remove();
            updateDirt();
          }
        }, 220);
      }, 1400);
    }

    function cleanSomeSmears(amount) {
      const smears = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".smear:not(.cleaning-away)")).slice(0, amount);
      smears.forEach(smear => {
        smear.classList.add("cleaning-away");
        window.setTimeout(() => {
          if (smear.isConnected) {
            smear.remove();
            updateDirt();
          }
        }, 220);
      });
    }

    function scrub(x, y) {
      const fullyClean = dirt <= 2 && !usingHand;

      // If already fully clean, prevent any further changes
      if (fullyClean) {
        return;
      }

      if (currentTool === "wipe") {
        dirt = Math.max(0, dirt - 1.7);
        usingHand = false;
        playWipeSound(1);
        cleanSomeSmears(2);
        reactionBox.textContent = dirt < 18 ? "Oh wow, it's actually clean now. Finally respectable." : "Good, you're on the right track. Keep scrubbing.";
      } else if (currentTool === "paper") {
        dirt = Math.max(22, dirt - 0.75);
        usingHand = false;
        playWipeSound(0.65);
        cleanSomeSmears(1);
        reactionBox.textContent = "It's getting lighter, but something feels... incomplete.";
      } else {
        dirt = Math.min(240, dirt + 2.4);
        usingHand = true;
        smearCount += 1;
        addSmear(x, y);
        reactionBox.textContent = dirt > 110
          ? "This has gone beyond dirty. The disaster is expanding beyond the legal limits of the frame."
          : "What are you even doing? You're making this worse by the second.";
      }
      updateDirt();
      if (currentTool === "wipe" && dirt <= 2 && !cleanCelebrated) {
        cleanCelebrated = true;
        reactionBox.textContent = "Perfect. All the brown is gone. Sparkly clean.";
        launchSparkleBurst();
      } else if (dirt > 2 || currentTool !== "wipe") {
        cleanCelebrated = false;
      }
    }

    function resetGame() {
      clearAnimationTimer();
      endPointerInteraction();
      switchBackgroundMusic("trouble.mp3", 0.35);
      dirt = 100;
      usingHand = false;
      smearCount = 0;
      cleanCelebrated = false;
      document.querySelectorAll(".smear").forEach(el => el.remove());
      sparkleLayer.innerHTML = "";
      playArea.classList.remove("clean-finish");
      setTool("paper");
      updateDirt();
      reactionBox.textContent = "Please select a tool first, then click and drag on the ASS.";
      setStatus("Cleaning in Progress");
    }

    function finishCheck() {
      clearAnimationTimer();
      sparkleLayer.innerHTML = "";
      endPointerInteraction();
      showScene("result");
      setStatus("Inspection Results Complete");
      if (dirt > 100) {
        resultAction = "retry";
        playAgainBtn.hidden = false;
        playAgainBtn.textContent = "Try Again";
        playAgainBtn.className = "danger";
        resultFace.innerHTML = '<img src="Weiju_bad.webp" alt="Bad cleaning result" decoding="async">';
        resultTitle.textContent = "Complete Disaster";
        resultText.textContent = "I declare this is not cleaning. You've escalated the situation. Go back and redo it right now. Don't come near me.";
      } else if (dirt > 45) {
        resultAction = "retry";
        playAgainBtn.hidden = false;
        playAgainBtn.textContent = "Try Again";
        playAgainBtn.className = "danger";
        resultFace.innerHTML = '<video src="Weiju_dare_small.mp4" autoplay loop muted playsinline preload="metadata"></video>';
        resultTitle.textContent = "How Dare You Submit This";
        resultText.textContent = "Did you think I wouldn't notice? This is only surface effort. Are you a spy from the Poo Poo Kingdom?";
      } else if (dirt > 10) {
        resultAction = "retry";
        playAgainBtn.hidden = false;
        playAgainBtn.textContent = "Try Again";
        playAgainBtn.className = "danger";
        resultFace.innerHTML = '<img src="Weiju_ok.webp" alt="Okay cleaning result" decoding="async">';
        resultTitle.textContent = "Barely Passing";
        resultText.textContent = "I can tell you tried, next time use the right tool from the start. Pipi de da bian still cho cho de.";
      } else {
        switchBackgroundMusic("In Love.mp3", 0.4);
        resultAction = "home";
        loveThemeUnlocked = true;
        playAgainBtn.hidden = false;
        playAgainBtn.textContent = "Back Home";
        playAgainBtn.className = "primary";
        setSuccessLoveMode(true);
        resultFace.innerHTML = '<img src="Weiju_wow.webp" alt="Good cleaning result" decoding="async">';
        resultTitle.textContent = "So Clean I'm Shocked";
        resultText.textContent = "Hao Bang!! You've performed outstandingly today. Da bian alert officially lifted.\n\nI think I just fell in love all over again ~~";
      }
    }

    function updateCursorPosition(event) {
      const rect = playArea.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = event.clientX - rect.left;
      const y = event.clientY - rect.top;
      cursorTool.style.left = x + "px";
      cursorTool.style.top = y + "px";
      return { x, y };
    }

    const nextToGameBtn = document.getElementById("nextToGame");
    const finishBtn = document.getElementById("finishBtn");
    let topStartLayer = 40;

    startPieces.forEach(piece => {
      if (piece === startExperienceBtn) {
        return;
      }

      piece.addEventListener("pointerdown", event => {
        if (event.button !== 0) {
          return;
        }

        event.preventDefault();
        const startX = event.clientX;
        const startY = event.clientY;
        const currentDragX = parseFloat(piece.style.getPropertyValue("--drag-x")) || 0;
        const currentDragY = parseFloat(piece.style.getPropertyValue("--drag-y")) || 0;
        let moved = false;

        piece.classList.add("dragging");
        piece.style.zIndex = String(++topStartLayer);
        piece.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);

        function handleMove(moveEvent) {
          if (moveEvent.pointerId !== event.pointerId) {
            return;
          }

          const deltaX = moveEvent.clientX - startX;
          const deltaY = moveEvent.clientY - startY;
          if (Math.abs(deltaX) > 6 || Math.abs(deltaY) > 6) {
            moved = true;
          }

          piece.style.setProperty("--drag-x", currentDragX + deltaX + "px");
          piece.style.setProperty("--drag-y", currentDragY + deltaY + "px");
        }

        function handleEnd(endEvent) {
          if (endEvent.pointerId !== event.pointerId) {
            return;
          }

          piece.classList.remove("dragging");
          piece.removeEventListener("pointermove", handleMove);
          piece.removeEventListener("pointerup", handleEnd);
          piece.removeEventListener("pointercancel", handleEnd);
          if (piece.hasPointerCapture(event.pointerId)) {
            piece.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
          }

          suppressStartClick = moved;
          window.setTimeout(() => {
            suppressStartClick = false;
          }, 0);
        }

        piece.addEventListener("pointermove", handleMove);
        piece.addEventListener("pointerup", handleEnd);
        piece.addEventListener("pointercancel", handleEnd);
      });
    });

    startExperienceBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      playClickSound();
      if (suppressStartClick || isTitleTransitionRunning) {
        return;
      }
      if (isOliverCovered()) {
        return;
      }

      switchBackgroundMusic("Tomodachi Life.mp3", 0.35);
      playIntroTitleTransition();
    });

    goToPoopBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      playClickSound();
      if (goToPoopBtn.disabled) {
        return;
      }
      runAnimation();
    });

    sayNoBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      playClickSound();
      const nextState = !introSaysNo;
      setIntroDecisionState(nextState);
      setStatus(nextState ? "Denied Toilet Access" : "Emergency Meeting");
    });

    introOliver.addEventListener("click", cycleIntroOliverImage);

    poopButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
      playClickSound();
      if (poopButton.classList.contains("hidden")) {
        return;
      }
      playPoopSound();
      poopButton.textContent = "Pooping...";
      poopButton.disabled = true;
      window.setTimeout(() => {
        poopButton.disabled = false;
        if (continueAnimationAfterPoop) {
          continueAnimationAfterPoop();
          continueAnimationAfterPoop = null;
        } else {
          poopButton.textContent = "Poop Again";
        }
      }, 900);
    });

    nextToGameBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      playClickSound();
      resetGame();
      showScene("game");
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".tool").forEach(tool => {
      tool.addEventListener("click", () => {
        setTool(tool.dataset.tool);
      });
    });

    playArea.addEventListener("pointerdown", event => {
      if (event.button !== 0) {
        return;
      }

      event.preventDefault();
      isPointerDown = true;
      activePointerId = event.pointerId;
      playArea.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
      cursorTool.style.display = "block";
      const point = updateCursorPosition(event);
      scrub(point.x, point.y);
    });

    playArea.addEventListener("pointermove", event => {
      if (activePointerId !== event.pointerId) {
        return;
      }

      updateCursorPosition(event);
      if (!isPointerDown) {
        return;
      }

      const rect = playArea.getBoundingClientRect();
      scrub(event.clientX - rect.left, event.clientY - rect.top);
    });

    function finishPlayAreaPointer(event) {
      if (activePointerId !== event.pointerId) {
        return;
      }

      if (playArea.hasPointerCapture(event.pointerId)) {
        playArea.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
      }
      endPointerInteraction();
    }

    playArea.addEventListener("pointerup", finishPlayAreaPointer);
    playArea.addEventListener("pointercancel", finishPlayAreaPointer);
    playArea.addEventListener("pointerleave", event => {
      if (isPointerDown && activePointerId === event.pointerId) {
        return;
      }
      cursorTool.style.display = "none";
    });
    playArea.addEventListener("pointerenter", event => {
      if (activePointerId === event.pointerId) {
        updateCursorPosition(event);
      }
    });

    finishBtn.addEventListener("click", finishCheck);

    playAgainBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      if (resultAction === "retry") {
        resetGame();
        showScene("game");
        return;
      }

      arrangeStartPile();
      clearTitleTransitionTimer();
      titleTransition.classList.remove("active");
      appShell.classList.remove("title-transitioning");
      isTitleTransitionRunning = false;
      showScene("start");
      setStatus("Standby");
    });

    updateIntroOliverImage();
    preloadIntroOliverImages();
    preloadToolImages();
    setSuccessLoveMode(false);
    setIntroDecisionState(false);
    arrangeStartPile();
    setTool("paper");
    updateDirt();
    setStatus("Standby");
  </script>
</body>
</html>
